race.comment: WAZZA (10) is a gelding by Ghaiyyath on debut for the Mitch Freedman yard. He's jumped out well enough and the mile should be an ideal trip first time out. Can make an immediate impact. FIERCE FIASCO (5) has been solid in two runs following a spell. Most recently finished 1.3 lengths away in second six weeks ago over 1607m at Kilmore. Ready to peak at the third run in. VESPASIAN (9) moderate effort to finish ninth last time over 1400m at Bendigo when fresh from a spell. Tackles this longer journey for the first time. Look for improvement. NEWCOMBE (8) last appeared when he finished fourth over 1800m at Casterton on July 5. Can contest.
